name: PenFed Pathfinder® Rewards Visa Signature® Card

welcome_offer.description: 50,000 bonus points after spending $3,000 in first 3 months

earning_rates.notes: 4x points on all travel purchases including airlines, cruises, taxis and public transit

other_benefits.name: Cell phone protection
other_benefits.description: Up to $1,000 per year in cell phone protection when paying monthly wireless bill

other_benefits.name: Priority Pass Select
other_benefits.description: Complimentary Priority Pass Select lounge membership for cardholders

other_benefits.name: Visa Signature Benefits
other_benefits.description: Access to Visa Signature concierge services and benefits

notes: Annual fee waived for Honors Advantage members (those with qualifying PenFed products). Strong 4x on travel and 3x on dining. Points worth ~1.25 cents each.

recurring_credits.name: $100 annual credit for travel
recurring_credits.description: $100 statement credit for travel purchases each year (for Honors Advantage members)
